name: compliance
description: Navigate privacy regulations (GDPR, CCPA), review DPAs, and handle data subject requests. Use when reviewing data processing agreements, responding to data subject access or deletion requests, assessing cross-border data transfer requirements, or evaluating privacy compliance.
review: Deep GDPR/CCPA guidance, DPA review framework, data subject request handling — genuinely comprehensive. Extremely detailed, covers all major regulatory touchpoints with specific obligations and timelines. Best-in-class SKILL.md — clear scope declaration, structured sections, practical examples.
